---
name: 💬 Support Question
about: Ask a question about how to use or configure the bot
title: "[HELP] "
labels: question
assignees: ""
---

**What is your question?**
A clear and concise description of what you need help with.

**What have you tried so far?**
Tell us what you have already done to try to solve this (e.g., read the documentation, tried different command parameters).

**Additional context**
Add any other context, logs, or screenshots that might help us answer your question.
